fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter so that the inventory and general ledger totals in the grid include information from only certain locations.

fields.name: Posting Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date or time interval that information in the grid is filtered by.
Only value entries and general ledger entries with posting dates within the filter are used to calculate the totals in the grid.
For more information, see How to: Enter Dates and Times.
